name: Far Eastern Rice Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the garlic.
2. Heat the butter in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the minced celery and onion to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes until softened.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts, cumin, fish, turmeric, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix in the cooked rice.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
8. Serve one portion.
